parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: $json.status, tts_text: $json.tts_text, action: $json.action, referenced_product_id: $json.referenced_product_id, referenced_location_id: $json.referenced_location_id, confidence: $json.confidence, source: $json.source, correlation_id: $json.correlation_id, recommendation: $json.recommendation || null }) }}
